description.value:
Trigger Two creatures enter area C7

Effect The creatures must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:26] save or become controlled, performing someone else's medical routine on autopilot. One creature is designated the doctor, one is designated the patient. The patient Strides 15 feet toward a bed within the haunt and then lies down. The haunt then rolls initiative, though it isn't obvious that a haunt is influencing them. Creatures that fail their save against the haunt are immune for 24 hours. The haunt can only affect two creatures at a time.

details.description: The memories of frequent medical care for the dying influence two PCs to repeat the past.
details.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:30] or @Check[religion|dc:30] to banish the spirits, @Check[athletics|dc:26] to physically shake a creature into consciousness, or @Check[medicine|dc:24] to treat a creature's dissociative symptoms.
details.reset: The haunt resets after 1 day unless the grief of the patient and doctor are dealt with.
details.routine:
(3 actions) If there are fewer than two creatures under the haunt's effect, it selects a new target to replace a missing patient or doctor; the target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:26] save. On the doctor's turn, they step forward and begin applying medical care to the patient. The doctor attempts a @Check[medicine|dc:25] check. Afterward, they can attempt a new Will save to escape the haunt.

Critical Success The doctor does not harm the patient.

Success The doctor deals @Damage[(1d8+4)[poison]] damage, @Damage[(1d8+4)[piercing]] damage or @Damage[(1d8+4)[slashing]] damage to the target (chosen at random).

Failure As success, but the doctor deals @Damage[(2d8+9)[poison]] damage, @Damage[(2d8+9)[piercing]] damage or @Damage[(2d8+9)[slashing]] damage

Critical Failure As success, but the doctor deals @Damage[(4d8+18)[poison]] damage, @Damage[(4d8+18)[piercing]] damage or @Damage[(4d8+18)[slashing]] damage.
